name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 23 Feb 2023
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we launched a very special feature that will help you measure the effectiveness of your campaigns."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more, please read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"New Feature","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Conversion Attribution","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Marketers are metrics-driven, and so we know you’ll love this new feature – Conversion Attribution."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Conversion Attribution is a strategy used to identify which email campaign led your contact to make a purchase and then associate the campaign with the order. Marketing Cloud implements this strategy using the Last-Touch attribution model that assigns the conversion credit to the last touchpoint before a lead is converted."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Marketing Cloud enables you to set up the Conversion Attribution strategy simply by setting up a set of parameters, without any coding effort."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"On the "},{"text":"Settings","bold":true},{"text":" page, select Conversion Attribution. Then, on the "},{"text":"Conversion Attribution","bold":true},{"text":" page, enable the "},{"text":"Enable Last-Touch attribution","bold":true},{"text":" toggle switch and then set up the rest of the parameters as you see fit. To learn how to set up the conversion attribution parameters, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Conversion-Attribution","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Conversion Attribution (Last-Touch Attribution)","bold":true},{"text":"."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ConversionAttribution.0685g00000CRpKfAAL.jpg","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ConversionAttribution.0685g00000CRpKfAAL.jpg","name":"Conversion Attribution","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":2158,"width":2560}}]}]
